antipattern.symptom: Reviewer posts 15+ nitpick comments and 0 issues.
antipattern.root-cause: Treating style preferences as blocking comments.
antipattern.fix: Move style to lint; batch residual nits into one comment.

antipattern.symptom: Issue-labelled comments with rationale 'I would do it differently'.
antipattern.fix: Down-label to suggestion or question; preserve issue for falsifiable defects.

antipattern.symptom: Agent-authored PR has agent-only approval and is merged.
antipattern.root-cause: Branch protection rule missing human-approver requirement.
antipattern.fix: Configure branch protection to require ≥1 human reviewer; reject merges otherwise.
